name: Recruiter: compose bulk InMail from a template ({Nombre} chip) — gated
description: Messages a project's candidates with a template {{body}} — replacing each literal {Name}/{Nombre} token with the LinkedIn variable CHIP. If target_profile_url/target_name is given, selects ONLY that one candidate (single-send, next-uncontacted); otherwise select-all (bulk). Sets the subject (handles the subject-reveal quirk). send=false (default) STOPS for a snapshot preview; send=true clicks Send (REAL InMail). Params: project_url, body, subject, send, target_profile_url, target_name.
